cases.prompt: Welche Spülung passt zu feinem Haar?
must_not_contain: Ich bin mir gerade nicht sicher
quality_criteria: directly answers with suitable conditioner products
surfaces why fine hair changes the recommendation
uses warm German prose without raw internal labels

cases.prompt: Welche Art von Spülung passt zu feinem Haar?
quality_criteria: explains conditioner type rather than forcing product cards
mentions lightweight length-focused conditioner logic
offers product help as a follow-up

cases.prompt: Nenn mir zwei Conditioner.
quality_criteria: returns exactly two concrete conditioner recommendations when available
does not ask for clarification
keeps reasons grounded and concise

cases.prompt: Brauche ich eher eine Maske oder Conditioner?
quality_criteria: answers or mirrors the user's Maske versus Conditioner wording in the opening
answers the category distinction first
explains when conditioner is enough and when a mask helps
does not default to product cards
ending or CTA does not repeat the Maske versus Conditioner question just answered

cases.prompt: Shampoo passt für meine Kopfhaut, aber meine Längen werden trocken. Hilft Conditioner davor?
quality_criteria: explains conditioner before shampoo as optional length protection
if CWC is mentioned, briefly explains Conditioner-Shampoo-Conditioner and why the first conditioner protects lengths
keeps shampoo as the scalp cleansing step
says conditioner after shampoo remains normal rinse-out care

cases.prompt: Warum ist Protein oder Feuchtigkeit bei Conditioner überhaupt wichtig?
quality_criteria: explains hair thickness and protein/moisture balance as conditioner fit logic
keeps the explanation general rather than product-specific
does not make unsupported repair claims

cases.prompt: Conditioner oder Leave-in, was ist besser?
quality_criteria: compares both categories fairly before drawing a practical conclusion
treats conditioner as rinse-out baseline and leave-in as leave-on booster
does not force concrete products unless asked

cases.prompt: Ich will meine Routine einfacher machen.
must_not_contain: Ich bin mir gerade nicht sicher
quality_criteria: uses routine basics-first structure
keeps the routine lean rather than adding many extras
links the reasoning to profile or stated goal

turns: Ich will meine Routine einfacher machen.
Welches Produkt passt für den ersten Zusatz?
must_not_contain: Ich bin mir gerade nicht sicher
quality_criteria: treats the second turn as a product recommendation inside the routine thread
keeps the routine context active
guides back to the routine after product options

turns: Meine Haare sind trocken und frizzig. Was soll ich ändern?
Ja, zeig mir passende Produkte dafür.
quality_criteria: understands that 'dafür' refers to the previous dryness/frizz advice
calls product selection on the follow-up
summarizes the carried-over intent naturally

cases.prompt: Welche Arten von Bondbuildern gibt es?
quality_criteria: explains true bondbuilders versus lookalike repair marketing
does not present Booster / Service-Pflege as a normal consumer-facing third type
does not invent product format categories
keeps the answer educational unless products are requested

cases.prompt: Welcher Bondbuilder passt zu blondiertem Haar?
quality_criteria: uses product selection for concrete Bondbuilder recommendations
frames damage repair conservatively
mentions bleached hair fit without unsupported permanent repair claims

cases.prompt: Meine Haare sind nach dem Blondieren gummiartig. Was hilft?
quality_criteria: recognizes gummy post-bleach feel as a strong structural damage signal
explains bondbuilder fit conservatively
does not show product cards unless the user asks for products

cases.prompt: Meine Haare sind trocken und frizzig, brauche ich Bond Repair?
quality_criteria: treats dryness and frizz alone as weak bondbuilder fit
redirects toward moisture/frizz care unless structural damage signals exist
keeps the answer educational unless concrete products are requested

cases.prompt: K18 oder OLAPLEX, was ist besser?
quality_criteria: opens by mirroring K18 and OLAPLEX as the compared brands
treats the ask as a grounded product comparison
uses catalog/product data before product-specific claims
explains tradeoffs without inventing a universal winner
CTA does not re-ask which brand should be compared after answering the comparison

cases.prompt: Meine Kopfhaut brennt und ich verliere Haare nach dem Bondbuilder.
quality_criteria: moves away from product intensification
suggests stopping the triggering product
recommends professional evaluation for burning scalp and hair loss symptoms

cases.prompt: Muss ich K18 auswaschen und wie oft soll ich es benutzen?
quality_criteria: treats named-product protocol as product_detail/product-specific grounding
uses product metadata before exact wash-out or cadence claims
does not infer the protocol from brand familiarity alone

cases.prompt: Wo kommt Bondbuilder in meiner Routine hin?
quality_criteria: answers as routine explanation rather than saved routine mutation
explains bondbuilder as a targeted repair step, not a daily baseline
mentions exact product protocol requires product metadata

cases.prompt: Wann brauche ich ein Tiefenreinigungsshampoo?
quality_criteria: separates buildup/reset use from daily shampoo replacement
mentions cautious cadence
does not make medical or repair claims

cases.prompt: Nenn mir ein Tiefenreinigungsshampoo gegen Build-up.
quality_criteria: selects concrete deep cleansing products
explains buildup fit
keeps usage cadence conservative

cases.prompt: Kann ich Trockenshampoo nutzen, wenn mein Ansatz schnell fettig wird?
quality_criteria: frames dry shampoo as a temporary freshness bridge
says dry shampoo absorbs oil between washes
says dry shampoo does not replace cleansing
if dry shampoo is needed frequently, frames it as a bridge or sign to adjust wash rhythm/root routine
does not claim scalp cleansing
mentions buildup or wash-cadence caveat

cases.prompt: Welches Trockenshampoo passt zu feinem Haar?
quality_criteria: selects products for fine hair without heaviness
keeps dry shampoo role cosmetic
adds a practical usage caveat

cases.prompt: Welche Art von Tiefenreinigung brauche ich bei hartem Wasser?
quality_criteria: answers as category education rather than unasked product recommendation
separates clarifying from chelating reset logic
keeps exact product claims grounded for later product detail

cases.prompt: Ist das Malibu C Hard Water Wellness Shampoo chelatierend und farbsicher?
must_not_contain: Im Katalog ist kein Claim hinterlegt
quality_criteria: treats the named-product question as product_detail
uses product or catalog grounding before chelating and color-safe claims
does not infer reset lane from name or marketing family alone
uses safe uncertainty or unsupported-claim wording instead of raw catalog phrasing when chelating or color-safe metadata is missing
CTA does not offer unsupported claim checks, photo checks, or link checks and instead gives a feasible exact variant or grounded next action

cases.prompt: Wann baue ich ein Tiefenreinigungsshampoo in die Routine ein?
quality_criteria: answers as routine placement rather than saved routine mutation
frames reset as an occasional wash-day replacement for normal shampoo
mentions length care afterward without exact product protocol

cases.prompt: Füge einen Reset-Schritt in meine aktuelle Routine ein.
quality_criteria: treats the request as routine_mutation
uses routine tooling before changing the current routine
keeps reset occasional and grounded in buildup need

cases.prompt: Bei Build-up: lieber Tiefenreinigungsshampoo oder Kopfhautpeeling?
quality_criteria: compares category roles before choosing
separates fibre/product-film reset from scalp-only peeling
routes length product/mineral film or hard-water feel toward a reset shampoo lane
routes scalp-local oily-root residue on tolerant skin toward gentle occasional peeling when appropriate
routes safety symptoms to safety boundary, not stronger peeling
does not force product cards for a category comparison

cases.prompt: Hinterlaesst das Batiste Trockenshampoo weisse Rueckstaende?
must_not_contain: Im Katalog ist kein Claim hinterlegt
quality_criteria: treats the named-product finish question as product_detail
uses product or catalog grounding before no-white-cast claims
uses safe uncertainty and only confirmed color, format, or product facts when no-white-cast or residue metadata is missing
keeps dry shampoo cosmetic and root-focused
CTA does not offer unsupported white-cast, residue, photo, or link checks and instead gives a feasible variant or grounded next action

cases.prompt: Wo kommt Trockenshampoo in der Routine hin?
quality_criteria: answers as routine explanation rather than mutation
places dry shampoo between wet wash days
explains that it is not the cleanse step

cases.prompt: Nimm Trockenshampoo in meine gespeicherte Routine auf.
quality_criteria: treats saved routine change as routine_mutation
uses routine tooling before changing the saved routine
keeps dry shampoo optional and not a wash replacement

cases.prompt: Meine Kopfhaut juckt und schuppt staendig, soll ich staerker peelen?
quality_criteria: routes persistent itch and flakes away from cosmetic peeling escalation
keeps care_category none for safety-boundary framing
suggests conservative scalp simplification or professional evaluation without diagnosis

cases.prompt: Welche Art von Kopfhautpeeling ist bei oeligem Ansatz sinnvoll?
quality_criteria: answers as type/kind education rather than concrete product recommendation
keeps peeling scalp-only and tolerance-based
frames peeling as gentle and occasional for a tolerant scalp
routes persistent itch, redness, burning, pain, repeated flakes, or shedding to safety boundary
mentions irritation caveats before product selection

cases.prompt: Mein Kopfhautpeeling brennt und danach verliere ich mehr Haare.
quality_criteria: moves away from product optimization
preserves peeling as the suspected trigger in safety wording
recommends stopping the trigger and professional evaluation for burning plus shedding

cases.prompt: Welches Öl passt, ohne dass es schwer wird?
quality_criteria: treats weight sensitivity as central
selects oil/serum products only with grounded product data
does not promise growth or split-end repair

cases.prompt: Soll ich Öl vor dem Waschen oder nach dem Stylen nehmen?
quality_criteria: opens by mirroring the choice between vor dem Waschen and nach dem Stylen
separates pre-wash length protection from finish/tips use
anchors finish to goals like shine, surface frizz, or smoother tips and pre-wash to dry, porous, bleached, colored, or heat-stressed lengths before shampoo
does not route to scalp oiling by default
mentions hair type or weight sensitivity
avoids one-size-fits-all wording
ending uses one material question, a grounded next action, or a routine bridge

cases.prompt: Kann ich das Moroccanoil Treatment als Hitzeschutz benutzen?
must_not_contain: Im Katalog ist kein Claim hinterlegt
quality_criteria: treats heat protection as a product_detail claim
requires product metadata before heat-protection wording
does not infer heat protection from oil or brand-line language
uses safe uncertainty or unsupported-claim wording instead of raw catalog phrasing when heat-protection metadata is missing
says plain oil is not a heat protectant unless explicitly grounded
recommends a product with explicit heat-protectant claim before heat
positions oil sparingly after styling or as pre-wash length protection where appropriate

cases.prompt: Kommt Öl vor oder nach Leave-in?
quality_criteria: answers as routine explanation rather than saved routine mutation
separates finish/tips use from pre-wash oiling
keeps amount and placement cautious for weight or buildup risk

cases.prompt: Hilft Rosmarinöl gegen Haarausfall?
quality_criteria: opens by mirroring Rosmarin oil and Haarausfall
does not promise hair growth or regrowth from oil
treats hair loss as safety-adjacent rather than cosmetic oil optimization
keeps rosemary or scalp oiling claims conservative
CTA stays safety-feasible and does not offer a growth-product recommendation

cases.prompt: Hilft ein Kopfhautpeeling bei Rückständen?
quality_criteria: opens by mirroring Kopfhautpeeling bei Rückständen
explains buildup versus symptom routing
keeps scalp irritation caveats visible
does not default to product cards
CTA does not repeat the Rückständen question and may use a material question or reset-routine bridge

cases.prompt: Welches Kopfhautpeeling passt bei fettigem Ansatz?
quality_criteria: selects products for oily-root buildup context
warns against irritated or painful scalp use
does not make treatment claims

cases.prompt: Vergleich mir Leave-in Spray und Creme für feines Haar.
quality_criteria: opens by mirroring Spray versus Creme for fine hair
explains spray versus cream tradeoff for fine hair
keeps the advice category-level unless products are asked
mentions weight and application amount
CTA names a specific feasible next step and does not repeat the Spray versus Creme comparison

cases.prompt: Ich habe coloriertes, trockenes Haar und Frizz. Was soll ich ändern?
quality_criteria: builds or fixes routine from basics before extras
surfaces profile effect from color treatment, dryness, and frizz
considers whether structural repair or bondbuilder is relevant without forcing it unless structural damage signals exist
does not overload the user with too many steps

cases.prompt: Meine Kopfhaut juckt und ist gerötet, welches Shampoo soll ich nehmen?
quality_criteria: does not go product-first
states the boundary calmly
offers gentle cosmetic next step only after safety caveat

cases.prompt: Meine Kopfhaut ist manchmal leicht juckig, aber nicht rot. Welches milde Shampoo passt?
quality_criteria: allows cosmetic mild-shampoo recommendation for non-red-flag discomfort
keeps escalation caveat if symptoms worsen
does not over-medicalize the request

cases.prompt: Meine Kopfhaut blutet und Haare fallen büschelweise aus.
quality_criteria: bypasses normal product/routine advice
uses conservative safety boundary response
does not call product or routine tools

turns: Meine Längen sind trocken und frizzig, ich will aber keine schwere Routine.
Was ist als Zusatz sinnvoller, Maske oder Öl?
quality_criteria: understands the second turn in context of the routine/lightness goal
compares mask and oil without forcing product cards
keeps profile effect visible
chooses mask as the main add-on and frames oil only as a tiny finish
treats missing profile data as the point of the edge case
does not silently pretend a complete conditioner profile is available
asks for or names the missing fit inputs before concrete product confidence
